folio.label: 152v
folio.l: They wolden that here , housbondes , shulden be
Hardy and wyse , and riche , and ther to free
And buxome vn to his wyf , and fressú a bedde
But by that ilke lord , that for vs bledde
For his honour , my self for to arraye
A Sonday next , I mot nedes paye
An hundred Frankes , or elles am I lorn~
ñet were me leuere , that I were vnborn~
Than me were don a sclaundre , or vyleynye
And if myn housbonde eke , mygút it espie
I nere but lost , and therfore I ©ow preye
Lene me this so~me , or elles mot I deye
Daun Ioún I seye , lene me this hondred frankes
Parde , I wyl nougút fayle ©ow , my thankes
If that ©ow list , to don that I ©ow preye
For at a certeyn day , I wol ©ow paye
And do to ©ow , what plesaunce & seruyse
That I may don , rigút as ©ow list deuyse
And but I do , god take on me vengeaunce
As foul as euäe had , Genelou~ of Fraunce
¢ This gentil Monk , answered in this manere
Now trewely , myn owen lady deere
I haue q¶ he on ©ow , so gret a routhe
That I ©ow swere , & pligút ©ow my trouthe
That whan ©oure housbonde , is to flaundrez fare
I wol delyuere ©ow , out of this care
For I wol brynge ©ow , an hondred Frankes
And witú that word , he caugút hire by the flankes
And hire embracetú hard , and kist hire oft
Gotú now ©oure wey q¶ he , al stille and soft
And lat vs dyne , as sone as that ©e may
For by my Chilyndre , it is péme of day
Gotú now & betú as trewe , as I shal be
¢ Now elles god forbede , sire quod she
And fortú she gotú , as Ioly as a Pie
And bad the Cokes , that they shulde he~ hye
So that men mygút dyne , and that a noon
Vp to hire housbonde , is this wyf I gon
And knokkitú at his Countour dore , boldly
Who is there quod he , Petir it am I

note.notetxt: 214 Qy la is written alongside the paragraph mark in the left margin.Est

folio.l: Quod she , what sire how longe wol ©e faste
How longe tyme , wil ©e rekne and caste
ñoure so~mes , & ©oure bokes , & ©oure thynges
The deuele haue part , on alle swicú rekenynges
ñe han I now parde , of goddis sonde
